id.description: The unique identifier of the ECR image.

image_digest.description: A unique identifier for the ECR image based on its content.

image_pushed_at.description: The timestamp when the image was pushed to the ECR.

image_size_in_bytes.description: The size of the ECR image in bytes.

image_tags.description: A list of tags associated with the ECR image.

image_uri.description: The URI of the ECR image.

registry_id.description: The ID of the AWS ECR registry containing the image.
